description: Google Cloud Runtime Configuration is a Google Cloud service for storing and exposing runtime configuration data such as variables and waiters for applications and deployments. It is documented under Cloud Deployment Manager and accessed through Google Cloud API and CLI tooling.
summary: runtimeconfig.googleapis.com exposes a Google Cloud Runtime Configuration REST API at `https://runtimeconfig.googleapis.com/` plus a corresponding `gcloud beta runtime-config` CLI; both require Google Cloud authentication via OAuth 2.0 access tokens.
